( Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, i) => (
)) ) : enterprises.length === 0 ? ( ) : ( enterprises.map((ent) => ( {ent.taxCode || 'N/A'}
{ent.logoUrl ? ( ) : (
{ent.name?.[0]}
)}
{ent.name} {ent.website}
{ent.industry || 'General'}
)) )}
); }
